tags.name: `mc-tab`
tags.description:
Purpose: A tabbed interface that allows users to navigate between different views or sections of content within the same page.
Category: Content Display, Navigation, Layout
When to use: When you need to display multiple views or sections of content in a compact space.
When not to use: For single-view interfaces or when a simple dropdown menu suffices.
Works with components: mc-tab-bar
Alternative component names: Tabbed Navigation, Tabbed Interface, Tab Control, Tab Panel, Tab View

Events:

  * `disabledchange` {`CustomEvent`} - Fired when disabled status of a tab changes.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where main label goes.

  * ``prefix`` {} - The prefix HTML to use for the mc-tab.

  * ``suffix`` {} - The suffix HTML to use for the mc-tab.

  * ``badge`` {} - Used if you want to attach badge to the mc-avatar.

Attributes:

  * `width` {`Width`} - 

  * `label` {`string | undefined`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

  * `icon` {`string`} - Name of the icon.

  * `trailingicon` {`string`} - Name of the railing icon.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the tab.

  * `active` {`boolean`} - Sets tab to `active` state.

  * `tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - Sets `tabindex` of the tab.

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets tab button in the `disabled` state, which will disable any user interaction with the tab button.

Properties:

  * `button` - 

  * `haseventlisteners` {`boolean`} - 

  * `width` {`Width`} - 

  * `id` {`string`} - Id of the tab.

  * `label` {`string | undefined`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

  * `icon` {`string`} - Name of the icon.

  * `trailingicon` {`string`} - Name of the railing icon.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the tab.

  * `active` {`boolean`} - Sets tab to `active` state.

  * `tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - Sets `tabindex` of the tab.

  * `index` {`number | undefined`} - Gets the index of the tab when sitting in a tab-bar.
Used to orchestrate the focus keyboard navigation.

  * `slot` {`string | undefined`} - Slot name of the tab.

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets tab button in the `disabled` state, which will disable any user interaction with the tab button.

  * `_onMouseDown` -

attributes.description:
`label` {`string | undefined`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

Property: label

Property: icon

Default:

Default:

Property: fit

Default: medium

Property: active

Default: false

attributes.name: tabindex

`tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - Sets `tabindex` of the tab.

Property: tabindex

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description:
`disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets tab button in the `disabled` state, which will disable any user interaction with the tab button.

Property: disabled

Default: false

attributes.description: `disabledchange` {`CustomEvent`} - Fired when disabled status of a tab changes.
